title: Danny Elfman
content: Daniel Robert Elfman (born May 29, 1953) is an American composer, singer, and songwriter. He came to prominence as the singer-songwriter for the new wave band Oingo Boingo in the early 1980s. Since the 1990s Elfman has garnered international recognition for composing over 100 feature film score s, as well as compositions for television, stage productions, and the concert hall.
